arts.ttl: Liverpool could be given free run at transfer – Reds speaking to player’s camp
arts.sum: Liverpool may be handed a free shot at Wolfsburg’s Mohamed Amoura this summer as Eintracht Frankfurt are unlikely to move for him. Florian Plettenberg covers the player today and how he is ‘one to watch’ for the summer transfer window after his impressive season in the Bundesliga so far. arts.ttl: PSG vs. Liverpool: Arne Slot facing disciplinary dilemma with four players walking tightrope
arts.sum: Four Liverpool players will be walking a disciplinary tightrope when the Premier League leaders face Paris Saint-Germain in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals 'best team in Europe' ahead of PSG clash
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot was full of praise for his side's upcoming Champions League opponents PSG, but didn't rank them as the best in Europe.

arts.ttl: PSG submit offer for Joshua Kimmich amid Arsenal interest
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have a long-standing interest in Joshua Kimmich (30), and according to Bild and Sky Sports Germany, they are now acting on it. PSG have been linked with the German international for several…

arts.ttl: Breaking: PSG submits offer to Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich per report
arts.sum: According to a report from Sport Bild journalists Christian Falk and Tobi Altschäffl (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Paris Saint-Germain has submitted an offer to Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich. ✅ Joshua Kimmich (30) has a concrete offer of Paris Saint-Germaim for Summer @BILD_Sport @altobelli13 pic.twitter.com/j5krlKekGD

arts.ttl: Five who played for both: PSG and Liverpool
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain and Liverpool do battle at the Parc des Princes in the Champions League’s Round of 16 this evening. Two of Europe’s in-form teams go head-to-head, as the league leaders of Ligue 1 and the Premier League meet in the Champions League. Throughout the years, several names have worn the colours of both clubs. […] The post Five who played for both: PSG and Liverpool first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chiesa and Donnarumma’s divergent paths cross in the Champions League
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa and Gianluigi Donnarumma were both hailed as Italy’s heroes at EURO 2020, but...

arts.ttl: Football's hottest couple: Glamorous WAG of ex-Liverpool star reveals nine-word message she told friends when she first laid eyes on him
arts.sum: The WAG of a former Liverpool star has shared what she told friends when she saw him for the first time. The player in question made 29 appearances during a six-year stint with the Reds.

arts.ttl: Petition launched to move Liverpool's Premier League trophy parade to London
arts.sum: Liverpool are closing in on winning their first Premier League title for five years, with planning underway on the traditional open-topped bus parade through the city to celebrate

arts.ttl: Liverpool meet PSG in last 16 after Arsenal and Aston Villa win away
arts.sum: Liverpool will face Paris St-Germain in the Champions League last-16, while Arsenal take on PSV Eindhoven and Aston Villa will play Club Brugge.
